title: Rename device - UI, device doesn't support
scenario: Device Name setting incorrectly appears in Device Settings > General for unsupported Poly devices
steps: Connect a Poly device that does NOT support renaming (e.g., any device not in the supported list: Poly Voyager Free 60+ UC, Poly Voyager Free 60, Poly Voyager Free 20, Poly Sync 20, Poly Sync 20M, Poly Sync 40)
Observe whether the "Device Name" option is displayed
expected: The "Device Name" option should NOT appear in Device Settings > General for devices that do not support renaming.
